attributes.action: We need an exclusively technology based-University within Doncaster.
attributes.additional_details:
A technology based University can reduce the poverty level or unemployment level here. More jobs could be created here. It appears that the city is booming academically by the introducing second UTC in Doncaster, an airport is going to be restarted or even by introducing a computer hub in 2027. 

It also appears that there are a good number of UTCs close to this city as well but there is no full-fledged technology-based university here. So, the proposed university can get huge number of pupils.
attributes.background: UK government can take initiative to establish a university in this City which could exclusively focus on technology.

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

You could also raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
